description: Install or update the DeepEval Evals module — registers skills in the help system and configures output paths.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{inline values: skip prompts with provided values}

description: Router and diagnostic — asks one question at a time to identify eval stage and routes to the correct skill.
Plan evaluation approach before writing any code — agent profile, failure modes, metric selection, three-tier gate strategy. Produces a written eval plan document.
Install and configure DeepEval in the project — pip install, API keys, Confident AI login, smoke test.
Add @observe decorators to agent code to enable component-level evals. Supports Python, LangGraph, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, Pydantic AI, OpenAI Agents SDK.
Create evaluation dataset with goldens — manual creation, Synthesizer (from docs/scratch), JSON/CSV import, or Confident AI cloud.

⭐ Trace review workflow (Hamel Husain): open coding → axial coding → binary judges → AlignEval calibration. Derives product-specific evals from real failures — the most important and most-skipped step.
Select the right metrics — built-in (TaskCompletion / ToolCorrectness / ArgumentCorrectness / PlanQuality / PlanAdherence / StepEfficiency) and pass^k measurement strategy.
Build GEval or DAGMetric custom judges — judge bias mitigation, AlignEval calibration, strict binary mode.
Run evals locally and interpret results — evals_iterator, diagnostic decision tree, tau-bench fault taxonomy, pass^k analysis, iteration guidance.
Migrate to production — Confident AI metric_collection (async, zero latency), CI/CD with deepeval test run, three-tier gate strategy, judge drift monitoring biweekly, cost-per-resolution tracking.
